# ReportRoom

> Publishing layer AI agents call directly: one API/MCP call -> a beautiful, analytics-instrumented live URL, with per-viewer analytics reported back.

## Docs
- [REST API reference](https://docs.reportroom.io/api.md): endpoints, auth, publish (Mode A HTML / Mode B markdown), analytics
- [MCP server](https://docs.reportroom.io/mcp.md): Streamable HTTP endpoint, tools, Claude Code setup

## Endpoints
- API base: https://api.reportroom.io
- MCP: https://mcp.reportroom.io/mcp

## Quickstart
- MCP: claude mcp add --transport http reportroom https://mcp.reportroom.io/mcp ; call create_account, then publish
- REST: POST /v1/signup {email} -> api_key ; POST /v1/sites {content, content_format:"markdown", type:"deck", slug} with Authorization: Bearer
